title: Subclasses of torch.nn.Module should call the initializer
description: Subclasses of torch.nn.Module should call the initializer to ensure correct initialization.
message: Subclass of torch.nn.Module has no initializer
impact: Code may not be properly initialized
why_is_this_an_issue: Proper initialization is essential for correct functionality and stability of the model.
how_to_fix: Implement an initializer method in the subclass of torch.nn.Module.

metadata.title: Subclasses of torch.nn.Module should call the initializer
